org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

Interface View

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    ModelObjectFigure<M>, ModelObjectView<M>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractEllipsoidAnchorFigure, AbstractModelObjectFigure, AbstractModelObjectSubFigure, AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure, AnchorFigure, BitmapNodeFigure, CircleNodeFigure, EdgeFigure, EllipseNodeFigure, FSMEndPointFigure, FSMStartPointFigure, FSMStateFigure, FSMTransitionFigure, InvisibleCircleAnchorFigure, InvisibleEllipsoidAnchorFigure, InvisibleRectangularAnchorFigure, InvisibleRoundRectangularAnchorFigure, InvisibleSquareAnchorFigure, NodeFigure, PolylineEdgeFigure, RectangleNodeFigure, RoundRectangleNodeFigure, SegmentEdgeFigure, SquareNodeFigure

    public interface View
    This is a view for a model object.

      UUID getUUID()
